name: Horseradish Beef Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Thinly sliced cooked roast beef (from deli)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread horseradish sauce on 2 slices of the bread.
2. Top with beef, beets, and lettuce.
3. Spread mayonnaise on remaining 2 slices of bread; place over lettuce.
4. Place the two assembled halves together to form 2 sandwiches.
